root_cause_or_best_diagnosis: The safe-debug production response showed model gpt-5.5 selected before snapshot loading. The route was accepting shared OPENAI_MODEL for a chat-completions JSON path where that future/shared value is not safe.
model_resolution_repair: Use DARREN_INTELLIGENCE_OPENAI_MODEL only when explicitly configured to an allowlisted safe model.
Ignore shared OPENAI_MODEL for this route.
Documented route-specific fallback because shared OPENAI_MODEL may be future/non-chat-compatible.
ignored_shared_model_values: any shared OPENAI_MODEL value not explicitly configured through DARREN_INTELLIGENCE_OPENAI_MODEL
production_smoke_test_plan: Run exactly one valid generation request.
Report only safe shape/count/safety fields if successful.
Report only safe debug diagnostic fields if failed.
limits: No production valid generation test run in this sprint
